productDisplayName: Provogue Men Ean Tan Flip Flops
description: When the heart desires utmost style, you shouldn't deprive it of it! These leather flip-flops from provogue offer a fantastic look coupled with unbelievable all-day comfort. The super soft leather strap and the cushy footbed are enough to give you a bed-of-roses feeling. It was never easier to look so perfectly relaxed and spectacular at the same time! Pair them with jeans or chinos and have a great day! Upper Wide over-the foot cushioned leather T-strap for extra comfort, durability and style Leather toe separator for more comfort and moisture-absorption Buckle on strap with branding for added attraction Midsole Cushioned footbed for extra support in all-day wear Branding on footbed Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Textured outsole for better traction on all surfaces shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
